title: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5070 Ti 16GB GDDR7
description: Next-gen Blackwell architecture delivers blistering 4K performance with DLSS 4. 16GB GDDR7 memory and PCIe 5.0 support keep you future-proof for the most demanding AAA titles and creator workflows.

title: AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT 16GB
description: RDNA 4 powerhouse with 16GB GDDR6 and hardware ray tracing. Excellent 1440p and capable 4K gaming with FSR 4 upscaling.

title: GIGABYTE GeForce RTX 5080 AORUS Master 16GB
description: Triple-fan WINDFORCE cooling, factory overclock, and RGB Fusion. Built for enthusiasts who want maximum frames at 4K.

title: AMD Ryzen 7 9800X3D 8-Core Processor
description: The new king of gaming CPUs. 8 Zen 5 cores with 96MB of 3D V-Cache and a 5.2GHz boost. Socket AM5.

title: Intel Core i7-14700K 20-Core Processor
description: 20 cores (8P + 12E), 5.6GHz max turbo, LGA1700. Excellent for gaming and content creation workloads.

title: AMD Ryzen 9 9950X 16-Core Processor
description: 16-core Zen 5 flagship. Up to 5.7GHz boost, 80MB cache, 170W TDP. Built for creators and serious multitaskers.

title: ASUS ROG STRIX X670E-E GAMING WIFI
description: Premium AM5 motherboard with PCIe 5.0, DDR5, WiFi 6E, and 18+2 power stages. Perfect base for a high-end Ryzen build.

title: MSI MPG Z790 EDGE WIFI DDR5
description: LGA1700 board for 13th/14th gen Intel. DDR5 up to 7800MHz, three M.2 slots, WiFi 6E, and reinforced PCIe slots.

title: Corsair Vengeance RGB 32GB (2x16GB) DDR5-6000
description: Tight CL30 timings, EXPO/XMP profiles, and stunning iCUE-controlled RGB. Optimized for Ryzen 7000/9000.

title: G.SKILL Trident Z5 RGB 64GB DDR5-6400
description: Massive 64GB kit for creators and heavy multitaskers. Premium binning and a sleek aluminum heatspreader.

title: Samsung 990 PRO 2TB PCIe 4.0 NVMe SSD
description: Up to 7,450 MB/s sequential read. The fastest mainstream PCIe 4.0 drive for game loads and creator workflows.

title: WD Black SN850X 4TB NVMe SSD
description: 4TB of blazing PCIe 4.0 storage. Up to 7,300 MB/s reads with a dedicated game-mode firmware tweak.

title: Corsair RM850x 850W 80+ Gold Modular PSU
description: Fully modular, ATX 3.1, native 12V-2x6 connector for next-gen GPUs. Silent zero-RPM fan mode under low loads.

title: NZXT H7 Flow Mid-Tower ATX Case
description: High-airflow perforated front panel, tempered glass side, and clean cable management for a show-piece build.

title: NZXT Kraken Elite 360 RGB AIO Cooler
description: 360mm liquid cooler with a 2.36" LCD display. Whisper-quiet pump and RGB fans tame even the hottest CPUs.

title: Noctua NH-D15 chromax.black Air Cooler
description: The legendary dual-tower air cooler, now in all black. Outperforms most 240mm AIOs at a fraction of the noise.

title: LG UltraGear 27GR95QE 27" 240Hz OLED Monitor
description: 1440p OLED with 0.03ms response time and 240Hz refresh. The ultimate competitive gaming display.

title: Samsung Odyssey G9 49" 240Hz QD-OLED
description: Curved 49" super-ultrawide QD-OLED. Immersive 32:9 aspect ratio with stunning HDR.

title: Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2 Wireless Mouse
description: 60g of pure speed. HERO 2 sensor, 95-hour battery, and the trusted feel pros rely on at every major LAN.

title: Razer Huntsman V3 Pro TKL Keyboard
description: Analog optical switches with adjustable actuation. Tournament-grade TKL form factor for serious FPS players.

title: SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless Headset
description: Dual-wireless (2.4GHz + Bluetooth), hot-swappable battery system, and Hi-Res Audio certified drivers.
